/CAL: ADDED TO CALENDAR PER DEFENSE REQUEST TO ADDRESS RELEASE CONDITIONS//ACM/CTORD: PARTICIPATE IN COUNSELING-THERAPY AND M3 SUPPORT GROUP THROUGHCASC AND PROVIDE PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT, REPORT TO SFPDP 5X PER WEEK FOR SUPERVISION/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES:WORK, THERAPY, CASC PROGRAMS/WEAP/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/VD: HEARING DATE OF 05-06-22/X: THE HEARING DATE OF 05-10-22 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL: TO SET PRCS 3455PC & STATUS OF 22004000/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD: TO SET PRCS 3455PC, ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT & TRAILING 22004000/DOP/
/CAL: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X: PER ACM, DEFENDANT IS AWAITING HOUSING & IS REQUESTING FOR MORE  TIME ON REPORT/X: 04-14-22 IS CONFIRMED FOR TRAILING #22003024 & ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/
/CAL: TO TRAIL FELONY 22003024/X: ACM IS REQUESTING FOR 1 MORE DAY TO EVALUATE HOUSING CONDITIONS/X: 04-14-22 IS CONFIRMED FOR TRAILING 22003024/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:APD 3455PC/X:CLERK ANGEVIC AGDEPPA/PD/CTORD: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/SHER/NB/X:WAIVED INSTRUCTIONS AND ARRAIGNMENT AND DENIED THE ALLEGATION/NB/X:BAIL SET AT NO BAIL WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,//CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 04-12-22 AND TRAIL  FELONY  22003024 ON 04-14-22/DOP/

/CAL:APD PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TOPC 3455/PD/CTORD: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/SHER/NB/TEXT:TRANS TODEPT 12/TRANS 12:FORTHWITH FOR AN ON APD 3455 PETITION & TO JOIN CASE #22003024/
/CAL:TO SET APD 3455PC (PRCS)/CONTD:PHC ON APD 3455PC IN DEPT, 14/DAWF/CONTD:APD 3455PC HRG IN DEPT, 22/DOP/
